title: Simple SetHome Commands
body:
**Overview**

Simple SetHome Commands is a lightweight, server-side Minecraft Fabric mod designed for version 1.21.4 that provides players with a simple home teleportation system. 

The mod allows players to set a personal home location and teleport back to it using intuitive commands.

**Commands**

/sethome - Sets the player's home location at their current position

/home - Teleports the player to their saved home location
Key Capabilities

**Installation & Building**

For Players : Drop the JAR file into the mods folder

Building : Uses Gradle with wrapper

Development : Compatible with IntelliJ IDEA and Eclipse 

**Use Cases**

Survival Servers : Quick return to base locations

Exploration : Safe return point after long journeys

Multiplayer : Personal teleportation without affecting 
other players

Per-Player Homes : Each player can set and maintain their own unique home location

Cross-Dimensional Support : Full support for teleportation between Overworld, Nether, and End dimensions

Coordinate Feedback : Displays exact coordinates when setting or teleporting to home locations
